message:
feat(tui): wire compose panel into TUI overlay stack (br-2bbt.17 Phase 2)

- Add Compose overlay (z=6) to OverlayLayer enum between Modal and Palette
- Wire Ctrl+N keybinding to open compose overlay with agent auto-complete
- Route key events through ComposeState::handle_key with full action dispatch
- Render compose panel between modal and command palette layers
- Add ServerControlMsg::ComposeEnvelope variant for TUI→server message send
- Handle compose send, close, and error states with toast notifications
- Add 6 compose wiring tests (overlay z-order, focus trapping, open/close)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
